name: Green Gage Plum Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (16 oz) green gage or purple plums
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the grape juice and add it to the gelatin, along with the syrup, mashed plums, salt, and lemon juice.
2. Allow the mixture to cool.
3. Pour half of the gelatin mixture into a 1-1/2 quart mold and chill until firm.
4. When the remaining gelatin has thickened like raw egg white, beat in the cream cheese until frothy.
5. Pour this over the firm gelatin mixture and chill until firm.
Source: MRS N.R. HOSEY (JUDY), MARVELL, AR, as printed in "High Cotton Cookin'", Marvell Academy Mother's Association, Marvell, AR 72366.
